description: Round toed, cream coloured shoes which have central lace fastening with metal eyelets and waxed cotton lace Nubuck, Italian leather, matte full grain, hairy suede and waxed canvas upper with overlays on the toe box, perforations throughout and reinforced overlay at the heel collar Synthetic suede lining, soft footbed, and tongue with leather patch which has embossed branding Eva midsole with detail stitched attached to the upper and foxing Rubber signature waffle outsole with scooped out diamond shaped grooves that create a distinct tread pattern
